title: Cherry-pick: "Adds documentation for mautic/mautic/pull/14100" to 7.1
body:
## Description

This PR cherry-picks https://github.com/mautic/user-documentation/pull/317 into the 7.1 branch.

Referring to the `mautic/mautic` PR:

- https://github.com/mautic/mautic/pull/14100

### Note

Currently, the above PR status is still open. Referring to [this comment](https://github.com/mautic/mautic/pull/14100#issuecomment-3527335689), the PR needs to be rebased to the 7.x branch. Therefore, the docs PR is cherry-picked into 7.0 and 7.1 branch.


<!-- PLEASE WRITE ABOVE THIS COMMENT. -->

<!--

Clearly describe what changes you have made in this PR, where our maintainers or reviewers should look at, and how to test the changes.

If the request is not complete but you want feedback or have quetions, you can select the "Draft Pull Request" option from the dropdown menu when creating the PR, then ask your questions or write your feedback in the comment.

-->

## Linked issue


<!-- PLEASE WRITE ABOVE THIS COMMENT. -->

<!--

If your PR is related to a current issue, please link to that issue number. Type the keyword "Closes" followed by a hashtag (#) symbol and the issue number that you can find right after the issue title. Don't add anything else, such as period, comma, etc, to this. For example:

❌ Closes: #123.

✅ Closes #123

Doing so will automatically close the issue when one of our maintainers merges your PR.

-->

## Screenshots or screen recordings

<!-- 

Provide screenshots or screen recordings before and after the changes, if it's a UI changes. You can simply drag and drop your files above this comment.

-->
author: adiati98

title: Cherry-pick: "Adds documentation for mautic/mautic/pull/14100" to 7.0

Referring to the `mautic/mautic` PR:

title: Chores: Restructure website
body:
<!--
Please write all information right after the headers (lines that start with ##). Don't write it in the comments (lines that wrapped inside the arrows).
-->

## Description

This PR restructures the website with below changes:

1. Add components: Header, Navigation, Footer, Hero, Courses, Resources, MobileMenu, MobileNav, Shoutouts, WeeklyTips, WIPBanner. **Note:** Shoutouts & WeeklyTips are not rendered.
2. Add a JS script for mobile menu
3. Add PagesLayout for pages style
4. Add an empty `about.astro` page


<!--

-->
